validate.notes: Fixed Dockerfile by adding 'unzip' package which was required for bun installation. Fixed tests/test_outputs.py to correctly parse the buildConfigOptions function that has complex TypeScript type annotations in its signature. The original test was finding the wrong '{' (inside the type annotation instead of the function body). Also fixed regex patterns and string matching that had escaping issues. Removed unreasonable rubric rules (else statements, variable naming, inlining) from eval_manifest.yaml since the gold solution itself doesn't follow them.
